rule_metadata.author: Leo Tsaousis (@laripping)
rule_metadata.title: Potential Remote Command Execution In Pod Container

rules.rule_text:
title: Potential Remote Command Execution In Pod Container
id: a1b0ca4e-7835-413e-8471-3ff2b8a66be6
status: test
description: 'Detects attempts to execute remote commands, within a Pod''s container
  using e.g. the "kubectl exec" command.

  '
references:
- https://microsoft.github.io/Threat-Matrix-for-Kubernetes/techniques/Exec%20into%20container/
author: Leo Tsaousis (@laripping)
date: 2024-03-26
tags:
- attack.t1609
- attack.execution
logsource:
  category: application
  product: kubernetes
  service: audit
detection:
  selection:
    verb: create
    objectRef.resource: pods
    objectRef.subresource: exec
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Legitimate debugging activity. Investigate the identity performing the requests
  and their authorization.
level: medium
